description: HomeConsole Caduceus public-lever module. Rust owns identity/profile/policy/state file convergence, Harmonia route declarations, and public binary possession checks; this sidecar carries constants only.

managed_files.content:
{
  "schema": "caduceus.policy.v1",
  "profile": "console",
  "allowed_public_actions": [
    "identity show",
    "profile show",
    "health",
    "receipts latest",
    "update status",
    "update now",
    "update service status",
    "update service toggle on",
    "update service toggle off"
  ],
  "private_land_organs_exposed": false
}
